steps.title: Connect cause to result
steps.content: Hartley argued that the USGS calculation omitted important considerations, including Earth's curvature. The next sentence gives the result of that criticism: the USGS-determined center was inaccurate.

steps.title: Use a consequence transition
steps.content: Choices A and B signal contrast, and Choice D signals sequence. The remaining transition introduces a conclusion caused by the omitted considerations. The answer is C.
